programme.title: Star Wars: Episode II -- Attack of the Clones
programme.desc: Set ten years after the events of "The Phantom Menace," the Republic continues to be mired in strife and chaos. A separatist movement encompassing hundreds of planets and powerful corporate alliances poses new threats to the galaxy that even the Jedi cannot stem. These moves, long planned by an as yet unrevealed and powerful force, lead to the beginning of the Clone Wars -- and the beginning of the end of the Republic.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Solo: A Star Wars Story
programme.desc: Young Han Solo finds adventure when he joins forces with a gang of galactic smugglers and a 190-year-old Wookiee named Chewbacca. Indebted to the gangster Dryden Vos, the crew devises a daring plan to travel to the mining planet Kessel to steal a batch of valuable coaxium. In need of a fast ship, Solo meets Lando Calrissian, the suave owner of the perfect vessel for the dangerous mission -- the Millennium Falcon.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story
programme.desc: Former scientist Galen Erso lives on a farm with his wife and young daughter, Jyn. His peaceful existence comes crashing down when the evil Orson Krennic takes him away from his beloved family. Many years later, Galen becomes the Empire's lead engineer for the most powerful weapon in the galaxy, the Death Star. Knowing that her father holds the key to its destruction, Jyn joins forces with a spy and other resistance fighters to steal the space station's plans for the Rebel Alliance.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Dune
programme.desc: In the year 10191, a spice called mélange is the most valuable substance known in the universe, and its only source is the desert planet Arrakis. A royal decree awards Arrakis to Duke Leto Atreides and ousts his bitter enemies, the Harkonnens. However, when the Harkonnens violently seize back their fiefdom, it is up to Paul, Leto's son, to lead the Fremen, the natives of Arrakis, in a battle for control of the planet and its spice. Based on Frank Herbert's epic novel.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Minions: The Rise of Gru
programme.desc: In the 1970s, young Gru tries to join a group of supervillains called the Vicious 6 after they oust their leader -- the legendary fighter Wild Knuckles. When the interview turns disastrous, Gru and his Minions go on the run with the Vicious 6 hot on their tails. Luckily, he finds an unlikely source for guidance -- Wild Knuckles himself -- and soon discovers that even bad guys need a little help from their friends.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Killjoys
programme.desc: Dutch and D'avin are on the hunt for a weapon that will draw out the Hullen; Johnny receives an SOS from Clara.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Killjoys
programme.desc: Dutch and D'avin attempt to train a replacement nerd; John finds his search for Clara is getting under some people's skin.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Killjoys
programme.desc: The Killjoys trace the last coordinates of a Black Root ship to a radiation scorched planet, finding an abandoned Hullen training camp, creepy inhabitants and a surprising connection to their past.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Killjoys
programme.sub-title: The Lion, the Witch & the Warlord
programme.desc: An ambush sends Dutch and Johnny on the run for help; D'avin tries to get to the bottom of a Black Warrant.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Star Wars: Episode V -- The Empire Strikes Back
programme.desc: The adventure continues in this "Star Wars" sequel. Luke Skywalker (Mark Hamill), Han Solo (Harrison Ford), Princess Leia (Carrie Fisher) and Chewbacca (Peter Mayhew) face attack by the Imperial forces and its AT-AT walkers on the ice planet Hoth. While Han and Leia escape in the Millennium Falcon, Luke travels to Dagobah in search of Yoda. Only with the Jedi master's help will Luke survive when the dark side of the Force beckons him into the ultimate duel with Darth Vader (David Prowse).

rating.system: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Star Wars: Episode VI -- Return of the Jedi
programme.desc: Luke Skywalker (Mark Hamill) battles horrible Jabba the Hutt and cruel Darth Vader to save his comrades in the Rebel Alliance and triumph over the Galactic Empire. Han Solo (Harrison Ford) and Princess Leia (Carrie Fisher) reaffirm their love and team with Chewbacca, Lando Calrissian (Billy Dee Williams), the Ewoks and the androids C-3PO and R2-D2 to aid in the disruption of the Dark Side and the defeat of the evil emperor.

rating.system: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Star Wars: The Force Awakens
programme.desc: Thirty years after the defeat of the Galactic Empire, the galaxy faces a new threat from the evil Kylo Ren (Adam Driver) and the First Order. When a defector named Finn crash-lands on a desert planet, he meets Rey (Daisy Ridley), a tough scavenger whose droid contains a top-secret map. Together, the young duo joins forces with Han Solo (Harrison Ford) to make sure the Resistance receives the intelligence concerning the whereabouts of Luke Skywalker (Mark Hamill), the last of the Jedi knights.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Star Wars: The Last Jedi
programme.desc: Luke Skywalker's peaceful and solitary existence gets upended when he encounters Rey, a young woman who shows strong signs of the Force. Her desire to learn the ways of the Jedi forces Luke to make a decision that changes their lives forever. Meanwhile, Kylo Ren and General Hux lead the First Order in an all-out assault against Leia and the Resistance for supremacy of the galaxy.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker
programme.desc: When it's discovered that the evil Emperor Palpatine did not die at the hands of Darth Vader, the rebels must race against the clock to find out his whereabouts. Finn and Poe lead the Resistance to put a stop to the First Order's plans to form a new Empire, while Rey anticipates her inevitable confrontation with Kylo Ren.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Blade
programme.desc: A half-mortal, half-immortal is out to avenge his mother's death and rid the world of vampires. The modern-day technologically advanced vampires he is going after are in search of his special blood type needed to summon an evil god who plays a key role in their plan to execute the human race.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Mummies
programme.desc: Three ancient mummies end up in present-day London and embark on a journey in search of an old ring belonging to the Royal Family, stolen by the ambitious archaeologist Lord Carnaby.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: O'Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) refuses to abandon a new team member who might not really be one of them.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 learns the wormhole may accidentally cause the extinction of life on a friendly world.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Cassandra develops strange new powers that pose a threat to her future and that of SG-1. Richard Dean Anderson stars.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Beckett and Castle must stop a series of events that could result in a war.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: When two women are found dead dressed as fairytale characters, Castle and Beckett must race to find the killer before he strikes again.

programme.desc: Daniel (Michael Shanks) goes on a rescue mission after his Unas friend Chaka is taken by slave traders. Stars Richard Dean Anderson.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.sub-title: Where No Man Has Gone Before
programme.desc: Kirk confronts two crew members (Gary Lockwood, Sally Kellerman) after a psychic force invades their minds.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Star Wars: Episode IV -- A New Hope
programme.desc: The Imperial Forces -- under orders from cruel Darth Vader (David Prowse) -- hold Princess Leia (Carrie Fisher) hostage, in their efforts to quell the rebellion against the Galactic Empire. Luke Skywalker (Mark Hamill) and Han Solo (Harrison Ford), captain of the Millennium Falcon, work together with the companionable droid duo R2-D2 (Kenny Baker) and C-3PO (Anthony Daniels) to rescue the beautiful princess, help the Rebel Alliance, and restore freedom and justice to the Galaxy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Chee pays Manuelito a visit after discovering a link between their cases; Leaphorn pursues a fugitive suspect; Special Agent Washington interviews an eyewitness to the crime she's investigating.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The Egyptian God of Chaos inhabits a human, and tries to release pure evil into the world; the librarians must decipher clues in a science museum.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
